# Md Asadujjaman Sabuj (Asad Sabuj)

> Top Rated WordPress expert on Upwork (100% Job Success Score, 1,500+ hours, 63+ projects). Based in Rangpur, Bangladesh. Converts Figma/PSD/XD designs into pixel-perfect WordPress websites.

## Summary
Asad Sabuj builds WordPress websites using Elementor Pro, Divi, and Gutenberg. He specializes in Figma-to-WordPress conversion, WooCommerce store development (Stripe, Afterpay, Xero), ACF and Custom Post Type architecture, WordPress bug fixing, and speed optimization. Clients are primarily from the USA, Australia, UK, and Europe.

## Key Facts
- Upwork profile: https://www.upwork.com/freelancers/~0187bfc383a4384ce5
- Hourly rate: $25/hr (Upwork); $20 for a 30-minute consultation call
- Job Success Score: 100%
- Hours logged: 1,500+
- Projects completed: 63+
- Location: Rangpur, Bangladesh (GMT+6)
- Languages: English (fluent), Bengali (native)
- Contact: asadujjamann@gmail.com

## Services
- Figma / PSD / XD to WordPress conversion
- WooCommerce store setup & customization
- WordPress bug fixing & troubleshooting
- Speed optimization & performance
- ACF + Custom Post Types development
- WordPress maintenance & support
- Front-end development (HTML5, CSS3, JavaScript, Bootstrap, Tailwind)
